entities.name: Pre-Build Discovery & PRD Protocol

entities.name: GROK BEFORE GREP
entities.context: Core principle that understanding must precede searching - you cannot search effectively until you understand what you're searching for

entities.name: Rubric scoring
entities.context: Quality measurement technique used to evaluate builds against defined criteria

entities.name: Architectural DNA
entities.context: Foundational architectural patterns that must be loaded in Phase 0 before any discovery or planning

entities.name: Phase 0
entities.context: Mandatory first step in the protocol requiring loading of architectural DNA before starting work
